derived.expense: {{ (Qty|float * Price|float)|money if Qty and Price else Expense }}
derived.qty: {{ Qty if Qty and Price else 1 }}
derived.price: {{ Price if Qty and Price else Expense }}
derived.url: {% if Set.startswith(non_english_prefixes) %}{% set sid = snkrdunk_ids.get(Set, {}).get(Card_No) %}{% if sid %}https://snkrdunk.com/apparels/{{ sid }}{% endif %}{% else %}https://www.pricecharting.com/search-products?type=prices&q={{ (Character ~ ' ' ~ Card_No)|urlencode }}{% endif %}
